description: The WorldCloseDialog component is used to confirm closing a world that the user is currently trying to close.

fields._worldName: The text field showing the name of the world being closed.
fields._saveButton: The button used to save the world being closed.
fields._saveAsButton: The button used to save the world as something for the world being closed.
fields._discardButton: The button used to discard changes for the world being closed.
fields._saveAction: The component to trigger with the request to save the world being closed.
fields._saveAsAction: The component to trigger with the request to save the world as something for the world being closed.
fields._discardAction: The component to trigger with the request to discard changes for the world being closed.

methods.OnCancel: Tells the dialog to cancel closing the world.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
